overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking at night through downtown Los Santos. The character walks along a wide boulevard with the illuminated Rockford Dorset hotel visible ahead, then turns right onto a narrower city street lined with commercial buildings. The scene features artificial street lighting, moderate vehicle traffic, and urban architecture typical of the game's setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban boulevard with freeway entrance ramp

events.description: pedestrian in yellow shirt walks past in the opposite direction
passing green freeway entrance sign marked with route number 2
approaching intersection and beginning to turn right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide sidewalk next to the multi-lane road, heading toward the intersection with the Rockford Dorset building visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt and dark pants walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large white art deco style hotel building with purple accent lighting and illuminated signage on the roof
metal guardrail separating the sidewalk from the lower freeway entrance ramp
tall street lamps illuminating the sidewalk with warm yellow light
green highway sign indicating freeway entrance with route number 2

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide urban boulevard at night, with the illuminated Rockford Dorset hotel dominating the view ahead. The sidewalk runs parallel to a multi-lane road with moderate traffic, separated by a metal guardrail. Street lamps cast warm light on the concrete path as the character approaches a freeway entrance and an intersection.

events.description: turned right at the intersection onto a narrower street
passed red do not enter sign and entered street with closer building facades

agents.ego_description: turned right at the intersection and continued walking along the narrower city street with commercial buildings on the right side

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign with white text reading DO NOT ENTER mounted on a black pole
low-rise building with large illuminated windows, warm interior lighting, and decorative facade elements
modern phone booth structure with illuminated red light on top

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the intersection, the scene transitions to a narrower city street with commercial buildings featuring illuminated windows. The Rockford Dorset hotel is now visible in the distance to the left. The character walks past a do not enter sign and continues along the sidewalk, passing a phone booth and various storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, brightly lit urban boulevard into a narrower city street lined with commercial storefronts. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk parallel to a multi-lane road, where the illuminated Rockford Dorset hotel dominates the horizon under the warm glow of street lamps. As the character approaches a freeway entrance and an intersection, the camera follows a right turn that shifts the perspective away from the open boulevard. The scene then transitions into a more confined urban corridor, leaving the hotel behind in the distance to the left while passing a do not enter sign and a phone booth. Finally, the movement continues along the sidewalk past a series of commercial buildings with glowing windows.
